event: triple lumen central venous access through right subclavian vein
packed red blood cells transfusion (2 units)
left radial artery cannulation with 20 ga PVC Jelco® cannula
ligation of bilateral internal iliac arteries
packed red blood cells transfusion (3 units)
disseminated intravascular coagulopathy on second day
acute respiratory distress syndrome on third day
dusky discoloration of digits of both hands on third postoperative day
left thumb, index, middle finger worsening discoloration on fifth day
Doppler ultrasound showing partial thrombosis at cannulation site
enoxaparin 0.4 ml subcutaneously for seven days
IV dextran 40 ml/hr for two days
stellate ganglion block with bupivacaine 0.25% 20 ml
digits turning dark over three days
amputation of gangrenous digits under brachial plexus block
